headline: Philip Morris (PM) Appoints Massimo Andolina as Group CFO
summary: Philip Morris International Inc. (NYSE:PM) is one of the best low risk stocks to buy in 2026. On May 20, Philip Morris International appointed Massimo Andolina as Group Chief Financial Officer, effective August 1. He succeeds Emmanuel Babeau, who will transition to a Strategic Advisor role until March 31, 2027, to ensure a seamless transition. […]

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock with Impressive Fundamentals and 2 We Brush Off
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.

headline: HDV: This May Not Be The ETF You Want, But It Could Be The One You Need Right Now
summary: HDV offers defensive exposure with a 2.90% yield, focusing on quality, high-dividend companies with strong moats. Read more on HDV ETF here.
